title: The Lost Tourist
description: Directions, transport, and prepositions of movement. A lost tourist finds Amazing School thanks to Bia.
summary_pt_br: Direções em inglês: go straight, turn left/right, take the second street, cross, between, opposite, on the corner. Preposições de movimento (to, into, through, across, along).

scenes.text_en:
A tourist stopped Bia on the boardwalk.
'Excuse me — how do I GET TO Amazing School?'
'GO STRAIGHT for two blocks,' Bia said,
'TURN LEFT at the ice-cream shop, CROSS the small square,
and the school is ON THE CORNER, OPPOSITE the surf shop.'
scenes.text_pt:
Um turista parou a Bia no calçadão.
'Com licença — como chego à Amazing School?'
'SIGA RETO por dois quarteirões,' disse a Bia,
'VIRE À ESQUERDA na sorveteria, ATRAVESSE a pracinha,
e a escola está NA ESQUINA, EM FRENTE à loja de surf.'

items.term: by bus / by car / by bike / by plane
items.pt: de ônibus / de carro / de bicicleta / de avião

scenes.title: By foot? No — ON foot.
scenes.body_en: For most transport: BY + vehicle (by car, by bus, by plane). Exception: ON FOOT for walking. Brazilians often say 'by foot' — wrong. Also: you GET ON/OFF a bus but GET IN/OUT OF a car. The rule: bigger vehicles you can stand up in → on/off.
scenes.body_pt: Transporte: BY + veículo (by car, by bus). EXCEÇÃO: ON FOOT (a pé). Erro clássico: 'by foot' — não existe. E: get ON/OFF ônibus/trem (grandes), get IN/OUT OF carro/táxi (pequenos).

examples.en: I go to school on foot. She goes by bus.
examples.pt: Eu vou a pé. Ela vai de ônibus.

examples.en: Get in the car. Get on the bus.
examples.pt: Entre no carro. Suba no ônibus.

exercise.question: Complete: 'I come to school ___ foot every day.'
exercise.explanation: ON FOOT — fixed expression, always with ON.

exercise.question: 'The bakery is ___ the pharmacy and the bank.'
exercise.explanation: BETWEEN for two specific landmarks on each side.

turns.en: Do you come by bike or by bus?
turns.pt: Você vem de bike ou de ônibus?

turns.en: Usually on foot. It's only 10 minutes.
turns.pt: Geralmente a pé. Dá uns 10 minutos.
